remove_radius_desc: Horizontal radius centered on the player, in centimeters, 1 foundation length is 400, for clearing Pixel Art around the player
save_file_desc: Select Palworld Level.sav save file (.sav only)
image_desc: Choose the image to convert into Pixel Art billboard
max_width_desc: Max width of the generated Pixel Art, minimum 10
max_height_desc: Max height of the generated Pixel Art, minimum 10
foundation_style_desc: Building style of the foundation row
pillar_style_desc: Building style of the support pillars
wall_style_desc: Building style of the billboard walls (Japanese disabled as it cannot be painted)
pillar_position_desc: Place pillars at the front or back corner of each foundation
pillar_height_desc: Number of pillar layers; determines how high the billboard floats above ground
wall_side_desc: Place the billboard wall on the left or right side of the foundation row
use_linear_desc: Fix in-game color over-brightness caused by sRGB values by converting to Linear
brightness_desc: Adjust image brightness; 1.0 is original brightness
saturation_desc: Adjust image saturation; 1.0 is original saturation
contrast_desc: Adjust image contrast; 1.0 is original contrast
please_select_image: Please select a valid image file
generated_stats: Generated: {foundations} foundations, {walls} walls, {glass} glass walls, {pillars} pillars
no_player_found: No player found in save file
player_not_found: No player found in save file
player_fallback: Specified player not found, generating at first player: {name}
please_select_save_first: Please select a save file to scan
